name: The Orginal Baked Whole Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lid off the pumpkin as you would for a jack-o-lantern.
2. Remove the seeds from the pumpkin.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients together, excluding the butter.
4. Fill the pumpkin with this mixture and top with the butter.
5. Cover with the pumpkin lid and place in a baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F degrees for 1 to 1 1/2 hours, or until the mixture has set like a custard.
7. Serve from the pumpkin at your table, scraping some of the meat from the pumpkin with each serving.
